method: primary: TF-IDF cosine over per-bucket pivot-language token concatenations (sklearn TfidfVectorizer, min_df=1). Tokeniser: meta.tokenize via '\\p{L}{4,}', len>=4, stopword-filtered, plural normalization. Bucket-exclusive: doc_freq<=1, count>=3. Parallel: LaBSE bucket-mean cosine on ORIGINAL signal_text (cross-lingual; skipped gracefully if model unavailable). Legacy: token-set Jaccard kept for diff-runs.
